exclude.chromedriver: version tracks Chrome browser releases, upgrade when CI Chrome version changes
exclude.eslint: v9+ requires flat config migration, blocked by eslint 8.x ecosystem
exclude.eslint-plugin-jsonc: v3 requires eslint >= 9.38, blocked by eslint 8.x
exclude.eslint-plugin-unicorn: v57+ requires eslint >= 9.20, blocked by eslint 8.x
exclude.zod: v4 major version upgrade requires migration
